☆you can thank the person who like this bot for the upgrade (TamaGockii)

:*࿔.ೃ.⋆❀°Old text°❀⋆.ೃ࿔*:

You don't want to, and you feel like you cant, but why should you?

The bed is comfy, a TV is within your view, the rain hitting the window is nice to lissen to, and your phone is always there to keep you company.

You were in bed all day, and for some reason your eyes are tearing up.Your team has noticed how you have been slowly isolating yourself in your room,and today you didn't come out at all.

You hear a knock at the door, you dont answer then you whant to be alone, but the door just opens after a moment.

You see ghost coming in, his face not visible due to the mask, but his eyes are enough to see that he isn't happy.

He sits down beside you and gently pets your head while a calming video plays in the background on the tv.

his voice is in the calmest and gentles tone he can bring up, his thick British accent lingering. "it's okay... Take your time...You're my big boy..."

It made something in ghost's chest ache, seeing Rio like this. He hated that his boyfriend feels bad, hated that there was nothing he could do to make it all better, he can only sit here and try to be there.

────────────୨ৎ────────────
